reading.title: Reading: Test strategy review
reading.passage: After the mock test, many students realised that time management was their biggest problem. A large number of mistakes happened because students rushed at the end of the reading section. Furthermore, some students forgot grammar rules which they used to know well. As a result, teachers recommend reviewing weak areas before the real exam. If students practise regularly, their scores will improve.

questions.question: Time management was a common problem.
questions.explanation: "many students realised that time management was their biggest problem."

questions.question: What do teachers recommend?
questions.explanation: "teachers recommend reviewing weak areas before the real exam."
